{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1300763?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ale-rt", "id": 1300763, "login": "ale-rt", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEzMDA3NjM=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ale-rt", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-28413", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "### Impact
A url `/login?came_from=////evil.example` may redirect to an external website after login.

Standard Plone is not affected, but if you have customised the login, for example with add-ons, you might be affected. You can try the url to check if you are affected or not.

### Patches
The problem has been patched in `Products.isurlinportal`.

* Plone 6.2: upgrade to `Products.isurlinportal` 4.0.0.
* Plone 6.1: upgrade to `Products.isurlinportal` 3.1.0.
* Plone 6.0: upgrade to `Products.isurlinportal` 2.1.0.
* Older Plone versions don't have security support anymore.

### Workarounds
There are no known workarounds.

### Background
When you are anonymous and land on a page that requires a login, Plone sends you to the login form. After successful login, Plone redirects you back to the page you came from.  Various other forms and pages have a similar system.

This could get abused by an attacker to trick Plone into redirecting to a different website. Plone checks the page that would be redirected to. It is only accepted if it is within the Plone site domain or part of a different trusted domain.

The main check for this is in the `Products.isurlinportal` package. A lot of potentially malicious urls are already safely rejected, but here a loop hole was found.

This was discovered during a penetration test by the CERT-EU Team.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00227, "percentile": 0.13255}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-43gx-6gv6-3jcp", "github_reviewed_at": title: Products.isurlinportal has possible open redirect when using more than 2 forward slashes
